details.test: Task 1: Earliest weekday speech evaluation after 3 PM at Main Clinic
Task 2: More experienced autism therapist for teens appointment flow
Task 3: Save three sensory processing articles for ages 35
Task 4: Register for earliest social skills group next month under $50
Task 5: Cost estimator for 4 speech & 2 OT sessions with in-network plan
Task 6: Find nearest clinic with free parking & Saturday hours and request a call
Task 7: Create and save weekly therapy plan with 3 sessions
Task 8: One-time $75 pledge to Therapy Scholarship Fund in honor of a family
